{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323020605E19B0E8AE024B30EDB73"}"},"total":98},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7444387487898387262","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"情节符合农村生活，内容也较生动"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1733282070,"group_id":"7413961520163343384","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5pwwte53l31sJqC68/LUqk=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788850&x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"681293969625932","user_name":"喜欢红麦的胡三爷"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"681293969625932","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7413961520163343384","book_info":{"abstract":"荒唐年代的乡村里，总有些不可言说的脏事。
少女李梦为了哥哥婚事，被迫辍学又被逼着嫁人，她把希望寄托在刚刚确定关系男友的身上。
可男友为了前途却果断抛弃她，一走了之。
绝望之下，李梦只好听从家里的安排，嫁给了村里名声极不好听的青年周默。
本来已经下定决心认命，好好过日子的李梦，却遭遇奇耻大辱。
新婚夜，周默借口出去，和自己的老相好钻了小树林，小两口还没开始培养的感情彻底破裂。
而当了三天媳妇的李梦，随着周默的外出打工，也成了千万留守妇女中的一员。
这还没完，婆婆竟然也有不干不净的男女关系。
李梦不想后半生都和这些烂人纠缠在一起，于是下定决心反抗。
可哥哥出门打工，老爹又是个奇葩，李梦没有任何助力和帮手。
绝望之际，和自己有过露水情缘的支教老师赵怀毅果断出手，帮她恢复了自由身。
可在这个极其封建落后的地方，婆家回不去，娘家容不下，她该何去何从？
本书讲述了90年代新思想和旧思想的抗争碰撞，女主反抗买卖婚姻，勇敢追求爱情和事业的故事。
没有金手指，现实风格，不是纯爽文，讲述那个年代留守妇女们的真实处境。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/49811e305b8c143cf33604b76133e522","author":"岁岁欣安","author_id":"","book_id":"7413961520163343384","book_name":"乡村留守妇女，荒唐人生荒唐事","book_short_name":"梦逐青禾","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#482018","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":79,"name":"年代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=79&name=年代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":3,"name":"现代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=3&name=现代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":11,"name":"乡村","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=11&name=乡村&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":840,"name":"发家致富","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=840&name=发家致富&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":862,"name":"家长里短","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=862&name=家长里短&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7422686147198845464","read_count":"19387","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1103034"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"537","tags":"年代,现代言情,乡村,发家致富,群像,家长里短","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o5b28da4ce4bd027a752334cd5399df1e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779386765&x-signature=WAcmKe1Sh5rxlD5yGIoDdKX%2F7BM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"108602307227","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"98"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323020605E19B0E8AE024B30EDB73"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读7小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":15,"fo
